title: Global Profitability Analysis: EcoEnergy Corp
text:
This group project was completed as part of the BAA1026 Data Analytics: Programming & Visualisation module at DCU, working in a team of five students.
Using Power BI, our team analysed ten years of internal data for EcoEnergy Corp, a fictional global sustainable infrastructure and technology company operating across five continents. The project involved building interactive dashboards to examine regional sales and profitability performance, identify cost inefficiencies, and develop data-driven outsourcing recommendations.
The analysis covered each of EcoEnergy Corp’s operating regions - Europe, North America, South America, Asia, and Africa - evaluating product-level profitability, median unit costs, and channel performance. Based on these insights, we proposed a strategic production hub model, recommending that manufacturing be concentrated in the lowest-cost regions for each product category. We also built a predictive dashboard to illustrate the projected impact of implementing these recommendations.
This project strengthened my skills in Power BI dashboard design, collaborative data analysis, and translating complex datasets into clear strategic recommendations within a team setting.
